requirement_topic.en: ESS Fire Safety After Korea ESS Fire Investigations
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国ESS火灾调查后的消防安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國ESS火災調查後的消防安全要求

summary.en: After multiple Korean ESS fire incidents, Korean authorities and industry participants introduced stricter ESS fire-safety expectations, including installation controls, battery and PCS separation, environmental management, monitoring, emergency response, and fire-protection review. KBIA industry guidance and KFI fire-safety testing or approval expectations may be requested by customers, insurers, local fire authorities, or project owners even where the product-level KC certificate has already been obtained.
summary.zh: 韩国发生多起ESS火灾后，监管机构和行业参与方提高了ESS消防安全要求，包括安装控制、电池与PCS隔离、环境管理、监控、应急响应和消防审查。即使已取得产品级KC证书，客户、保险方、地方消防部门或项目业主仍可能要求满足KBIA行业指引以及KFI消防安全测试或认可要求。
summary.zht: 韓國發生多起ESS火災後，監管機構和行業參與方提高了ESS消防安全要求，包括安裝控制、電池與PCS隔離、環境管理、監控、應急響應和消防審查。即使已取得產品級KC證書，客戶、保險方、地方消防部門或項目業主仍可能要求滿足KBIA行業指引以及KFI消防安全測試或認可要求。

standards_or_laws: KFI fire-safety testing and approval practices for fire-protection products and systems
KBIA ESS fire-safety and industry guidance
South Korea fire-code and local fire-authority review for ESS installations

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project-specific fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents may support technical due diligence but do not replace Korean fire-authority, KFI, insurer, or project-owner expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代韩国消防主管机关、KFI、保险方或项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代韓國消防主管機關、KFI、保險方或項目業主要求。

gap.en: A product-level battery safety certificate does not close the Korean ESS fire-safety gap. Exporters should prepare installation drawings, fire-protection design, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, gas detection or ventilation evidence where relevant, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring records, and local-language emergency procedures for review by the Korean project owner, local fire authority, insurer, and any KFI-related approval route.
gap.zh: 产品级电池安全证书不能覆盖韩国ESS消防安全差距。出口商应准备安装图、消防设计、热失控缓解证据、适用时的气体探测或通风证据、紧急停机逻辑、监控记录和当地语言应急程序，以供韩国项目业主、地方消防部门、保险方及任何KFI相关认可路径审查。
gap.zht: 產品級電池安全證書不能覆蓋韓國ESS消防安全差距。出口商應準備安裝圖、消防設計、熱失控緩解證據、適用時的氣體探測或通風證據、緊急停機邏輯、監控記錄和當地語言應急程序，以供韓國項目業主、地方消防部門、保險方及任何KFI相關認可路徑審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation approval where fire-code or local fire-authority review applies; KFI / KBIA expectations may be project, insurer, or customer requirements after the ESS fire reforms
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC battery certification alone is not enough for Korean ESS projects. Fire-safety package review, local installation approval, and KFI / KBIA-related expectations should be addressed before shipment or site commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] KC电池认证本身不足以覆盖韩国ESS项目要求。出货或现场调试前，应处理消防安全资料包审查、当地安装批准以及KFI/KBIA相关要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] KC電池認證本身不足以覆蓋韓國ESS項目要求。出貨或現場調試前，應處理消防安全資料包審查、當地安裝批准以及KFI/KBIA相關要求。
